title: School Permission Slip
text:
## School Permission Slip

Dear Parent,

Our class will visit the {adjective} Museum of {plural noun} on {adjective}day.

**Students should bring:**
- A {adjective} lunch
- A {adjective} water bottle
- {adjective} shoes

**Itinerary:** We will {verb} through the {adjective} exhibit and learn about {adjective} history.

**Permission granted** to ride the {adjective} bus and participate in the {adjective} workshop.

**Emergency contact:** {person} at {number} o'clock.

**Note:** If your child is allergic to {plural noun}, {plural noun}, or enthusiasm, please inform us.
